items.name: The Chicken & The Pancake
items.description: Jumbo fried chicken, cheese scallion pancake, spicy glaze, chive. Crema and egg your way
items.simplified_description: Fried chicken with cheese pancake, spicy glaze, and customizable egg.

items.name: BUILD YOUR BRUNCH
items.description:
Two egg your ways
Choice of Buttersauce Baguette or Two pancakes or Buttered Toast or Steamed Rice
Choice of Marinated Steak or Pork Chop or Crispy Pork Bellies or Spicy Chorizo or Grilled Tomato and Mushroom
items.simplified_description: Custom brunch with eggs, bread or rice, and choice of meat or veggies.

items.name: Bò Né (Viet steak and Eggs )
items.description: Marinated steak, two eggs as you like, pate, French cheese, Baguette with Bonjour Saigon Butter sauce
items.simplified_description: Marinated steak and eggs with pate, cheese, and buttered baguette.

items.name: Cơm Tấm ( Viet’s famous breakfast broken rice)
items.description: Choice of Pork Chop or Chicken , fried egg, pickle, tomato, cucumber, confit scallion, broken rice served with house fish sauce.
items.simplified_description: Broken rice with pork or chicken, egg, pickles, and fish sauce.

items.name: Mama Hoa “Hangover” Fried Rice
items.description: Jambon, chorizo, pork bellies, house sauce, veggies topped with fried egg, crispy onion, cilantro, green onion – Substitute Wild Mushroom and Tofu for Vegetarian option
items.simplified_description: Fried rice with meats, veggies, egg, and crispy onion; vegetarian option available.

items.name: Extra Side
items.description: Hashbrown – House salad – Pancake (1) – Crispy pork belly – Spicy Chorizo sausage
items.simplified_description: Choice of hashbrown, salad, pancake, pork belly, or spicy chorizo sausage.

items.name: Chả Giò (Traditional Viet spring rolls)
items.description: Three crispy fried spring rolls, minced pork, taro, carrot, chives served with traditional fish sauce or creamy sesame peanut sauce
items.simplified_description: Three fried pork spring rolls with taro and veggies, served with sauces.

items.name: Gỏi Cuốn (salad rolls)
items.description: Three rolls, choice of Pork & Prawn or Tofu & Mushroom, vermicelli, herbs served with creamy sesame hoisin sauce, roasted peanut
items.simplified_description: Three fresh rolls with pork & prawn or tofu & mushroom, herbs, and sauce.

items.name: Saigon Fries
items.description: House seasoning served with butter & sugar
items.simplified_description: Fries with house seasoning, butter, and sugar.

items.name: Gỏi Đu Đủ Trộn Tôm Thịt (Viet papaya salad)
items.description: Pork & Prawn or Tofu and Mushroom (V), papaya, carrot, Vietnamese herb, toasted peanut, prawn crackers served with pineapple fish sauce vinaigrette
items.simplified_description: Papaya salad with pork & prawn or tofu, peanuts, and prawn crackers.

items.name: Crispy Tiger Prawn & Wonton Chip
items.description: Tossed in tangy creamy chili sauce, peanut, sesame seed, green onion
items.simplified_description: Tiger prawns with wonton chips in creamy chili sauce with peanuts.

items.name: Má Heo Nướng (Charbroiled Pork Jowl)
items.description: Marinated pork jowl, house pickle, greens spicy peanut sauce
items.simplified_description: Charbroiled pork jowl with pickles, greens, and spicy peanut sauce.

items.name: Cánh Gà Chiên (Crispy Chicken Wings)
items.description: Mama Hoa’s caramelized Fish sauce/ Vietnamese style Garlic Butter
items.simplified_description: Crispy chicken wings with caramelized fish sauce or garlic butter.

items.name: Traditional Bánh Mì
items.description: Jambon, Viet ham, house pate, cucumber, butter sauce, pickle, cilantro, crispy onion.
items.simplified_description: Vietnamese sandwich with ham, pate, cucumber, butter sauce, and pickles.

items.name: Bánh Mì Thịt Nướng (BBQ Pork)
items.description: Charbroiled pork, pickle, cucumber, butter sauce, cilantro, crispy onion, house BBQ sauce.
items.simplified_description: Vietnamese sandwich with BBQ pork, pickles, cucumber, and butter sauce.

items.name: Bánh mì Bò nướng bơ Sa tế (Butter Satay Lemongrass)
items.description: Grilled lemongrass beef, butter, butter sauce, cilantro, pickle, cucumber and crispy onion.
items.simplified_description: Grilled lemongrass beef sandwich with butter sauce and fresh vegetables.

items.name: Bánh mì Gà nướng (Grilled Lemongrass Chicken)
items.description: Grilled lemongrass chicken, butter sauce, cilantro, pickle, cucumber and crispy onion.
items.simplified_description: Grilled lemongrass chicken sandwich with butter sauce and fresh vegetables.

items.name: Vietnamese beef dip (French & Viet fusion)
items.description: Braised tender brisket, creamy cheese sauce, crispy shallot dip with mama Hoa’s stew.
items.simplified_description: Braised beef with creamy cheese sauce and crispy shallot dip.

items.name: Vietnamese Satay Chop Cheese
items.description: Choice of Steak or Chicken Or Tofu & Mushroom, cheddar and swiss, tomato, lettuce, spicy peanut sauce, crispy onion, scallion oil.
items.simplified_description: Sandwich with choice of protein, cheese, spicy peanut sauce, and vegetables.

items.name: Fried chicken Sandwich
items.description: Jumbo Fried Chicken with creamy chili sauce, fresh green, tomato, pickle onion, buttered toast
items.simplified_description: Fried chicken sandwich with creamy chili sauce and fresh vegetables.

items.name: Wild Mushroom Grilled Cheese
items.description: Soy marinated mushroom, mixed cheese, tomato & basil remoulade.
items.simplified_description: Grilled cheese sandwich with soy-marinated mushrooms and tomato basil sauce.

items.name: Bún thịt nướng chả giò (Vermicelli bowl)
items.description: Charbroiled Pork or Steak , springroll, herbs, pickle, toasted peanut and fried shallot.  Sub Tofu & Mushroom and seasoned soya sauce for vegetarian options.
items.simplified_description: Vermicelli bowl with choice of meat or tofu, springroll, herbs, and peanuts.

items.name: Bò Hầm ( Mama Hoa’s signature braised beef stew)
items.description: Vietnamese twist on tradition French beef stew, tender braised brisket & flank in a slight spiced coconut tomato broth, touch of wine served with tradition baguette for dipping or rice noodle
items.simplified_description: Braised beef stew in spiced coconut tomato broth with baguette or rice noodles.

items.name: Nui Xào (Vietnamese Stir Fried Pasta & Egg)
items.description: Vietnamese style stir fried pasta, caramelized onion & pepper, touch of butter  Add Steak or Shrimp – $3  Chicken or Tofu and Mushroom – $2
items.simplified_description: Stir-fried pasta with egg, onion, pepper, and butter; add protein for extra cost.

items.name: Hủ Tiếu Sa Tế ( District 5 peanut satay soup)
items.description: Satay marinated steak, beef ball, rice noodle, tomato, cucumber topped with peanut and crispy onion
items.simplified_description: Peanut satay soup with marinated steak, beef balls, rice noodles, and vegetables.

items.name: Bonjour Saigon’s PHở
items.description: Thick sliced of beef flank, beef shank, beef balls, shaved fresh sirloin, in our version of Phở broth, comes with fresh Vietnamese herb & beansprout. No MSG added.  Recommended with pickled garlic.
items.simplified_description: Beef pho with various cuts of beef, herbs, and beansprouts in broth.

items.name: Chicken & Wonton Chip Tossed Egg Noodle
items.description: Crispy chicken & wonton, fresh cucumber, egg noodle with sweet chilli aioli & toasted peanut
items.simplified_description: Egg noodles with crispy chicken, wonton chips, cucumber, chili aioli, and peanuts.

items.name: Cơm Tấm (Vietnamese broken rice)
items.description: Choice of pork chop or chicken, fried egg, fish sauce, pickle.
items.simplified_description: Broken rice with choice of pork or chicken, fried egg, and pickles.

items.name: Cơm Chiên ( Viet Fried Rice)
items.description: Assorted vegetable, special stir fried sauce, eggs garnished with crispy onion, cilantro and  scallion  Add Steak or Shrimp – $3  Chicken or Tofu and Mushroom – $2
items.simplified_description: Fried rice with vegetables, eggs, and herbs; add protein for extra cost.

items.name: Family BBQ Platter for 4
items.description: Charbroiled pork chop, Grilled lemongrass steak & chicken, spring rolls, rice, choice of salad or fries, fresh herb, house pickle, two dipping sauces, crispy onion & toasted peanut, scallion oil.
items.simplified_description: BBQ platter with assorted meats, spring rolls, rice, sides, and dipping sauces for four.

items.name: Platter for 2 (Shareable)
items.description: Choice of one Shareable Choice of two Main mix and match (brunches are not included) Choice of one Dessert
items.simplified_description: A shareable platter with one shareable, two mains, and one dessert.

items.name: Cà phê sữa (Vietnamese espresso with condensed milk)
items.description: Hot / Cold – 16oz  Add topping $2  Coconut cream or Salted cream
items.simplified_description: Vietnamese espresso with sweet condensed milk, served hot or cold.

items.name: CAFE DU MONDE COFFEE
items.description: 16oz
items.simplified_description: A 16oz serving of Cafe Du Monde coffee.

items.name: TEA SELECTION
items.description: Jasmine / Earls grey / Green tea / Citrus
items.simplified_description: Choice of jasmine, Earl Grey, green, or citrus tea.

items.name: Citrus Peach Orange Tea
items.description: House blend cold brew, fresh orange, house lemongrass & peach syrup
items.simplified_description: Cold brew tea with fresh orange, lemongrass, and peach syrup.

items.name: Lychee Mint Tea
items.description: House blend cold brew, lychee, crushed mint, lime juice
items.simplified_description: Cold brew tea with lychee, mint, and lime juice.

items.name: Citrus lime honey tea
items.description: House blend cold brew, fresh lime juice, honey, orange
items.simplified_description: Cold brew tea with lime juice, honey, and orange.
